title: linociera luzonica
intro: Linociera luzonica, a plant species native to the Philippines, is a type of shrub or small tree that belongs to the family Meliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, particularly its antimalarial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's bark and leaves are rich in flavonoids and alkaloids, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating pain, as well as its potential to treat various diseases. Linociera luzonica can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
